hero.title: Awaken Your
hero.subtitle: Experience modern aesthetic technology paired with medical-grade clinical protocols. We deliver personalized solutions for lasting beauty.

items.title: Advanced Equipment
items.desc: FDA (USA) and CE (Europe) certified device systems.

items.title: Authentic Cosmeceuticals
items.desc: 100% guaranteed products from the world's leading dermo-cosmetic brands.

items.title: Licensed Practitioners
items.desc: Experienced technicians, thoroughly trained and professionally certified.

items.name: Medical-Grade Extraction
items.desc: Safe blackhead and acne extraction under a specialized magnifying lamp.

items.name: SkinClinic Chemical Peel
items.desc: Resurfaces skin texture and improves acne scars and dark spots.

items.name: Biological Light Therapy
items.desc: Anti-inflammatory light therapy to reduce redness and swelling.

items.name: IPL Acne Dark Spot Removal
items.desc: High-intensity pulsed light technology breaks down pigmentation.

items.name: Vitamin C/HA Iontophoresis
items.desc: Delivers active nutrients deep into the skin via bio-electric current.

items.name: Premium B5 Skin Recovery
items.desc: Soothes and rebuilds the barrier of damaged, stressed skin.

items.name: Specialized Recovery Mask
items.desc: Deep hydration that calms sensitive skin.

items.name: Deep Cleansing Facial
items.desc: Deep pore cleansing that removes accumulated impurities.

items.name: Physical Exfoliation
items.desc: Removes dead skin cells for instantly brighter, smoother skin.

items.name: Relaxing Facial Massage
items.desc: Relaxes facial muscles and stimulates blood circulation.

items.name: Skin Detox Suction Therapy
items.desc: Draws out toxins built up from cosmetics and pollution.

items.name: 10-Session Acne Package
items.desc: A complete package for long-term acne control.

items.name: Instant Radiance Combo
items.desc: Combines cleansing, recovery and brightening care.

items.name: 5-Session Rejuvenation Package
items.desc: Advanced technology for deeply rejuvenated skin.
